scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:guard -- && cdk deploy --all --require-approval never --profile prime-deal-auto
scripts.deploy:guard: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const profile = 'prime-deal-auto'; const requiredAccount = '141814481613'; const account = execSync('aws sts get-caller-identity --profile ' + profile + ' --query Account --output text').toString().trim(); if (account !== requiredAccount) { console.error('Wrong account: ' + account + '. Required: ' + requiredAccount + '. Use profile: ' + profile); process.exit(1); } console.log('Using profile: ' + profile + ', deploy target account: ' + account);"
scripts.deploy:database: npm run deploy:guard -- && cdk deploy PrimeDeals-Database --require-approval never --profile prime-deal-auto
scripts.deploy:api: npm run deploy:guard -- && cdk deploy PrimeDeals-Api --require-approval never --profile prime-deal-auto
